data.title: Azitra Inc Faces NYSE Compliance Deadline Notice
data.description:
Azitra Inc ( (AZTR) ) has provided an update.

On October 1, 2025, Azitra, Inc. received a notice from NYSE American LLC regarding non-compliance with the minimum stockholders’ equity requirement, having only $2.2 million against the required $4 million. Azitra has until October 31, 2025, to submit a compliance plan to avoid delisting, with a deadline for achieving compliance by April 1, 2027. The notice does not immediately affect the company’s stock trading or operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (AZTR) stock is a Hold with a $0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Azitra Inc stock, see the AZTR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AZTR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AZTR is a Neutral.

Azitra Inc’s overall stock score is primarily driven by weak financial performance and unfavorable technical indicators. While corporate events reflect positive strategic developments, they are insufficient to offset significant financial concerns and poor valuation metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on AZTR stock, click here.

More about Azitra Inc

Azitra, Inc. is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative therapies for precision dermatology. Its lead program, ATR-12, targets Netherton syndrome, a rare skin disease, while ATR-04 addresses EGFR inhibitor-associated rash. The company leverages a proprietary platform of engineered proteins and a microbial library, enhanced by AI and machine learning, to develop its products.

data.title: SHF Holdings Awaits Nasdaq Compliance Confirmation
data.description:
SHF Holdings ( (SHFS) ) has provided an update.

On April 7, 2025, SHF Holdings received a notice from Nasdaq indicating non-compliance with listing requirements due to insufficient stockholders’ equity. The company has since taken actions to regain compliance, believing its equity now exceeds the $2.5 million threshold required by Nasdaq. SHF Holdings issued Series B Preferred Stock and Warrants, exempt from registration under the Securities Act, to bolster its financial standing. The company awaits Nasdaq’s confirmation of compliance and has filed a Certificate of Designation for the Series B Preferred Stock, which is convertible into Class A Common Stock.

data.title: Chain Bridge I Secures Capital Contribution Agreement
data.description:
Chain Bridge I ( (CBRRF) ) has provided an update.

On September 29, 2025, Chain Bridge I and Fulton AC I LLC entered into a Contribution Agreement where Fulton AC agreed to make monthly capital contributions to Chain Bridge I’s trust account. This agreement aims to prevent the redemption of Class A ordinary shares in connection with an extraordinary general meeting scheduled for October 29, 2025. The meeting will consider extending the termination date for a business combination from November 15, 2025, to November 15, 2026, and removing limitations on redemptions. If approved, Fulton AC will contribute $0.01 per non-redeemed Public Share monthly until the extended termination date or the completion of a business combination. The agreement’s success is contingent on shareholder approval of the amendment proposal. If the proposal is not approved, the company will wind up and dissolve.

More about Chain Bridge I

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Orion Energy Systems Finalizes Acquisition Agreements
data.description:
Orion Energy Systems ( (OESX) ) has shared an update.

On September 30, 2025, Orion Energy Systems finalized several financial and operational agreements related to its acquisition of Voltrek, LLC. The company settled its fiscal 2024 earnout obligations with payments totaling $875,000 and issued $1 million in common stock to Kathleen Connors for fiscal 2025 obligations. A subordinated loan agreement was established with Final Frontier to defer remaining earnout payments, with monthly principal and interest payments scheduled through July 2027. Additionally, a security agreement was made to secure obligations, subordinated to Bank of America’s senior credit facilities.
